Who We Are

A Dedicated Team You Can Rely On

Our primary focus is to provide accounting, taxation, business consultancy, ICT services, bank financing, and other services to individuals, partnerships, companies, cooperative societies, and other organizations across Tanzania.

What makes us unique is our approach, knowledge, insight, and experience alongside the degree of professionalism, integrity, and excellence we maintain while helping clients realize their strategic goals.

We keep all costs fixed — so you know exactly what you are paying in advance. Our policy of continuous training ensures we deliver service that is commercially focused, honest, and above all, friendly and affordable.

Read More
July 2018NBAA Registration
FixedTransparent Pricing
KahamaBranch Office
Our Core Values

Five Pillars of Our Practice

These values guide how we serve every client, every time.

Quality & Accuracy

We provide accounting, tax, and financial perspectives that are thorough, accurate, and correct — the first time and every time.

Client Best Interest

We always recommend only the services you need — nothing more, nothing less. Your interests come first, always.

Straightforward Answers

Accounting, tax, and legal regulations can be extremely technical. We translate complexity into clear, concise perspectives.

Responsiveness

No matter how big or small your issue, we are committed to being responsive to your needs — promptly and reliably.

Integrity & Ethics

We operate with unwavering integrity. Our clients trust us with sensitive information and we honour that trust in everything we do.

What We Do

Our Services

A comprehensive suite of financial, advisory, and technology services tailored for Tanzanian businesses.

Accounting Services

Full book-keeping, statutory accounts, management accounts, payroll, annual financial statements, and debtor management.

Book-keepingPayrollAuditingReporting

Tax Consulting

Corporate Income Tax, VAT, withholding taxes, tax health-checks, due diligence audits, dealings with tax authorities, and payroll services.

CITVATPayrollTax Advisory

IT Services

Web hosting, data centre, networking, system development, IT support, ERP optimization, technology risk and security, and hardware supply.

NetworkingERPSecurityCCTV

SAP Implementation

SAP sales licensing, implementation, system support, and SAP add-on development for businesses of all sizes.

SAP B1ImplementationAdd-on Dev

Project Management

Feasibility studies, project plans, strategic plans, business plans, credit financing arrangements, monitoring and evaluation.

FeasibilityStrategyM&E

Bank & Corporate Financing

Assist businesses in raising funds via loans and private equity, loan restructuring, consolidation, and securing competitive rates locally and offshore.

LoansPrivate EquityRestructuring

Business Formalization

BRELA registration, land title processing, financial management training, project management, tax management, and business advisory.

BRELALand TitlesTraining

Secretarial Services

Annual returns filing, director/secretary appointments and terminations, share capital increases, and company searches.

Annual ReturnsCompany SearchCorporate
The People

Our Expert Team

Qualified, experienced professionals committed to delivering excellence across every service area.

Vedasto T. Owano
Partner

Vedasto brings over 6 years of professional experience in Finance and Accounting. He specialises in Business Advisory, Joint Venture Accounting, Reporting, and Internal & External Auditing. He has developed in-depth knowledge of the financial services sector including operations, regulatory, and compliance aspects. Involved in implementing internal controls with exposure to legal, tax, accounting, administration, and corporate secretarial functions.

ACCA MemberBAF – Mzumbe UniversityPG Diploma in Taxation
Fahad A. Mwakaje
Partner · SAP Certified

Fahad is a Certified Public Accountant CPA(T) with over 6 years of experience in Accounting, Tax, and Consultancy services. He previously worked as an external auditor with Nexia SJ Tanzania and has diverse industry exposure covering Not-for-Profit entities, US-funded projects, Insurance Companies, Banks, and Manufacturing Companies.

ACCA MemberCPA(T) – NBAAPG Diploma in TaxationSAP Certified
Giridhari Jha
Partner – Head of IT · SAP Certified

An accomplished IT leader with over 18 years of experience specialising in IT infrastructure, operations, networking, and programming. He has successfully managed SAP B1 ERP implementations across various industries for both domestic and international markets. His expertise spans business process mapping, SAP customisation, end-to-end project management, network administration, and server configuration.

CCNAMCSASAP Functional & Technical18+ Years IT
Kefas Elias Manase
Partner

Kefas possesses 4 years of professional experience in Audit, Tax, and Corporate Finance, having served clients ranging from large public sector corporations to private limited concerns. He also carries nearly 5 years of experience in the Health and Agriculture Industries in Administration and General Management, with expertise in research analysis, management consulting, and business process restructuring.

Audit & TaxManagement ConsultingHealth & Agri Sector
Alex Casar Chaulo
Head of IT

Experienced IT professional proficient in PHP, CSS, HTML, MySQL, C++, JavaScript, Java OOP, Angular, Spring Boot, and Android development. Responsible for device control, security, and website management at Cubestone.

Feisal Mohammad
Accounts & IT Consultant

Provides strong financial and IT-related advisory solutions. Specialises in designing and setting up IT networks and infrastructures, with a particular focus on audit software solutions and clear client communication.
